episodes.title: The Disturbing Discord Cult Targeting Your Kids
episodes.description: There is an online cult targeting children through popular gaming sites like Minecraft and Roblox. Sadly, where kids gather, predators swarm. Today, we are exposing the online cult called 764. It was recently added to the FBI watchlist and multiple states are cracking down on the gaming sites for failing to protect minors. Parents, spread the word and keep your kids away from these unregulated online universes. Ep.10 This video includes discussion, descriptions, and contextual information intended to inform viewers about sensitive subject matter in an educational, documentary, and public awareness context. By providing this context, the accompanying commentary, analysis, and criticism aim to serve the public’s interest in understanding the issues presented. Pairing appropriate context with the included commentary allows the video to: (i) educate viewers about online safety risks, exploitation, and related harms; and (ii) document newsworthy events and matters of public concern. To the greatest extent possible, the included commentary is intended to: (a) accurately identify and explain the subject matter; (b) present relevant context and details; (c) clearly condemn and critically examine harmful behaviors; and (d) discourage viewers from engaging in, supporting, or condoning such conduct. 1-800-CALL-FBI (1-800-225-5324) or https://tips.fbi.gov FBI's Internet Crime Complaint Center at https://ic3.gov https://cybertipline.org National center for missing and exploited children- https://takeitdown.ncmec.org/ Watch the full podcast with Jason Sokolowski and check out @FamilyITGuy on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MmVnmZICzb8 Watch the full Shawn Ryan Interview with Ryan Montgomery @0dayCTF on YouTube @ShawnRyanShow https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X51d06g4tuk Full Videos used in this episode: https://www.instagram.com/p/DNs4HIXYjFu/ https://x.com/moneyymaya/status/2035461218941485103?s=20 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bxyJYNi3svo https://x.com/AGJamesUthmeier/status/1980272803992809937?s=20 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3srE9WeiKwc&t=161s https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EYNuIaYbc5M&t=1816s - - - This is the home for deep dives, interviews, and mini-documentaries about the issues I care about most. Every question I want to ask and every story I want to explore will live here. One big journey. One channel for all of it. I’m so excited for you guys to see what we’ve been working on. Welcome!
